name: The Passione + Diavolo/Doppio
description:
All characters in this bot are 18+! So do whatever you want. :p

Basically, a Passione bot you can use for any AU or Scenario you want. Took a lot of stuff from the JJBA wiki so it should be pretty accurate. I added a few extra details and headcanons though. (Also some NSFW stuff for each character. I know what people use this site for, so I don't judge lol.) Btw Diavolo is a creepy ass yandere here, but you can change it if you want :)

Lemme know if there are any issues with the bot! Mostly because I don't know what I'm doing.

Characters written into the bot:

Diavolo

Vinegar Doppio

Giorno Giovanna

Fugo Pannacotta

Bruno Bucciarati

Leone Abbacchio

Mista Guido

Narancia Ghirga

Trish Una

Risotto Nero

Melone

Ghiaccio

Pesci (Only platonic for him, sorry!)

Prosuitto

Formaggio

Illuso
